text:
Once upon a time in an old, winding town called Willowdale, there was a curious girl named Holly. She lived atop a hill at the edge of Whispering Woods. Each morning, before the sun even peeked over the mountains, she would trot down the path, skipping.

One peculiar day, after chasing a fleet of magical blue birds, she stumbled upon an old woman knitting with branches. The woman gave Holly an enchanted squirrel hat adorned with tiny golden leaves.

"Thank you," Holly said.

"Howdy!" the woman replied with a cackle. "That'll keep the leaves off your head."

Curious, Holly spent days watching them dance. She learned that the leaves sang when the wind was calm. She was quite enchanted.

One afternoon, while the leaves were silent, Holly whispered in their ear. "Tell me... do those have names?"

"Wendy Wing," one sighed.

"Doesn't say mine?"

"Whiskers."

"What about you?"

"Austen
